Circle.description:
Renderer-shortcut alias for an ellipse with rx==ry. Deprecated at HEAD;
the codemod normalises it to `ellipse`.
Circle.title: Circle

Curve.description: Renderer-shortcut alias for a single cubic Bézier. Deprecated; codemod → path.
Curve.title: Curve

Pattern.description: FG extension paint (P2): tiled hatch/dots/grid, region-clipped.
Pattern.title: Pattern

Polygon.description: Renderer-shortcut alias for a closed polyline. Deprecated; codemod normalises.
Polygon.title: Polygon

Sizing.description:
P4 content sizing. The field on objects is `sizing` (renamed from `size`
to resolve the collision with IconObject.size).
Sizing.title: Sizing

title: FrameGraph v2 (HEAD 2.2.0) — generated from the Pydantic models (core conformance profile)
